intentSynonyms: read recent messages from a channel in discord
read recent messages from a discord channel with optional pagination in discord
description: Read recent messages from a Discord channel with optional pagination

channel.description: Channel ID to read messages from

limit.description: Number of messages to return (default 50, max 100)

before.description: Get messages before this message ID (for pagination)

after.description: Get messages after this message ID

around.description: Get messages around this message ID
